name: Ribbon Switchboard
description: Inspect local over-under depth in a dense analytic ribbon field, then continuously follow the marked signal to its true terminal.
natural_language: Use local hover illumination to inspect the marked ribbon and its over-under crossings. Once its source arms, press and hold there, follow the same ribbon monotonically through every crossing, release on its true terminal, and certify the routed signal.

metadata.variant_count_kind: ribbon count, woven permutations, curve timing, crossing depth order, target signal, and clearances
metadata.notes: Generated layouts are clearance-audited. The verifier independently replays local hover coverage and the raw monotonic pointer hold against the intended curve and ordered crossing parameters.
